<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\GroupedEndpoints; use Knuckles\Scribe\Commands\GenerateDocumentation; use Knuckles\Scribe\Matching\RouteMatcherInterface; use Knuckles\Scribe\Tools\PathConfig; class GroupedEndpointsFactory { public function make( GenerateDocumentation $command, RouteMatcherInterface $routeMatcher, PathConfig $paths ): GroupedEndpointsContract { if ($command->isForcing()) { return static::fromApp( command: $command, routeMatcher: $routeMatcher, preserveUserChanges: false, paths: $paths ); } if ($command->shouldExtract()) { return static::fromApp( command: $command, routeMatcher: $routeMatcher, preserveUserChanges: true, paths: $paths ); } return static::fromCamelDir($paths); } public static function fromApp( GenerateDocumentation $command, RouteMatcherInterface $routeMatcher, bool $preserveUserChanges, PathConfig $paths ): GroupedEndpointsFromApp { return new GroupedEndpointsFromApp($command, $routeMatcher, $paths, $preserveUserChanges); } public static function fromCamelDir(PathConfig $paths): GroupedEndpointsFromCamelDir { return new GroupedEndpointsFromCamelDir($paths); } }
